title: Search分词器类型与配置方法-云数据库 Tair（兼容 Redis®）-阿里云
heading_path: 自定义分词器配置： # 本示例配置了名为emoticons和conjunctions的Character Filter，同时配置了Whitespace Tokenizer以及Lowercase Token Filter和Stop Token Filter。 { "mappings":{ "properties":{ "f0":{ "type":"text", "analyzer":"my_custom_analyzer" } } }, "settings":{ "analysis":{ "analyzer":{ "my_custom_analyzer":{ "type":"custom", "tokenizer":"whitespace", "filter":[ "lowercase", "stop" ], "char_filter": [ "emoticons", "conjunctions" ] } }, "char_filter":{ "emoticons":{ "type":"mapping", "mappings":[ ":) => _happy_", ":( => _sad_" ] }, "conjunctions":{ "type":"mapping", "mappings":[ "&=>and" ] } } } } } > 附录1：支持的Character Filter > Mapping Character Filter
